ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether to show processing options on each image drop/paste
ast.target: 选择是否在每次拖放/粘贴图像时显示处理选项

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Quickly apply a combination of presets

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically apply this alignment when inserting new images. Set to 'none' to disable.
ast.target: 插入新图像时自动应用此对齐方式。设置为“none”以禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose where to store the cache file for image alignments. Note: App reload required.
ast.target: 选择图像对齐缓存文件的存储位置。注意：需要重新加载应用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Interval (in minutes) to clean up redundant entries from image alignment cache. Default: 1 hour (0 to disable)
ast.target: 清理图像对齐缓存中冗余条目的间隔（分钟）。默认：1 小时（0 为禁用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow resizing images by dragging edges of the image.
ast.target: 允许通过拖拽图像边缘来调整大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prevent accidental distortions of image aspect ratio when dragging to resize
ast.target: 防止拖拽调整大小时意外扭曲图像纵横比

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow resizing images using the scroll wheel
ast.target: 允许使用滚轮调整图像大小

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key that must be held while using scroll-wheel to resize
ast.target: 使用滚轮调整大小时必须按住的按键

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adjust how sensitive the scroll-wheel resize is (0.01-1.0)
ast.target: 调整滚轮缩放的灵敏度（0.01-1.0）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Non-destructive resizing in reading mode is only visual, thus if it is too distractive you can disable it.
ast.target: 阅读模式下的无损缩放仅为视觉效果，因此如果过于分散注意力，可以将其禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a color for image captions e.g.: red, grey, white, black, hsl(50, 50%, 50%), rgb(50%, 75%, 100%)
ast.target: 为图片说明选择颜色，例如：red、grey、white、black、hsl(50, 50%, 50%)、rgb(50%, 75%, 100%)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the font style (e.g., italic, normal).

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a background color for image captions (e.g.: transparent, #f5f5f5, rgba(255,255,255,0.8))
ast.target: 为图片说明选择背景色（例如：transparent、#f5f5f5、rgba(255,255,255,0.8)）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 设置边框样式（例如：1px solid gray）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set border radius for caption (e.g., make it slightly rounded: 4px)
ast.target: 为说明设置圆角（例如：略微圆润：4px）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set space between image and caption (e.g., 4px, 8px)
ast.target: 设置图片与说明之间的间距（例如：4px、8px）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 设置标题周围的内边距（例如：4px 8px）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of image extensions to exclude from captions (e.g., PNG, JPG).
ast.target: 要从标题中排除的图像扩展名列表（用逗号分隔，例如：PNG, JPG）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to handle filename conflicts
ast.target: 选择如何处理文件名冲突

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a custom subfolder name or path.
ast.target: 输入自定义子文件夹名称或路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Quality setting for pngquant (e.g., 65-80). Both min-max values must be provided.
ast.target: pngquant 的质量设置（例如：65-80）。必须提供最小值和最大值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 编码预设（速度与压缩率）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: No working encoder found. Install FFmpeg with libaom-av1, libsvtav1, or ensure hardware drivers are installed.
ast.target: 未找到可用的编码器。请安装带有 libaom-av1、libsvtav1 的 FFmpeg，或确保已安装硬件驱动。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If the processed image filesize is larger than the original, use the original image instead. Sometimes compression can increase file size, especially with certain formats or settings, but if you would prefer to always get smaller file sizes, enable this option.
ast.target: 如果处理后的图像文件大小大于原始文件，则改用原始图像。有时压缩会增加文件大小，尤其是在某些格式或设置下；若希望始终获得更小的文件大小，请启用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This option allows you to further specify, how much the file size must be reduced before compressing the image. Sometimes an image's size might shrink by only 3 KB, but the visible degradation in quality is significant. This option helps catch those cases and avoids compressing such images. Default is 30kb, which means if after compressing the image file size would reduce only by 30kb or less, then the original image bytes will be used instead. Set to 0 to always allow compression when the output is smaller.
ast.target: 此选项允许你进一步指定：在压缩图像前文件大小必须减少多少。有时图像仅缩小 3 KB，但可见的质量劣化却很明显。此选项有助于捕捉这些情况并避免压缩这类图像。默认值为 30kb，意味着如果压缩后文件大小仅减少 30kb 或更少，则会改用原始图像字节。设置为 0 则在输出更小时始终允许压缩。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose between wikilink and Markdown format
ast.target: 在 wikilink 和 Markdown 格式之间选择

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how paths should be formatted
ast.target: 选择路径应如何格式化

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to resize the image
ast.target: 选择如何调整图像大小

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Plugin automatically reads the original image dimensions and applies the provided value to the longer of the width or height. The other dimension is then calculated automatically if 'maintain aspect ratio' is enabled.
ast.target: 插件会自动读取原始图像尺寸，并将提供的值应用于宽度或高度中较长的一边。如果启用“maintain aspect ratio”，另一维度将自动计算。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Plugin automatically reads the original image dimensions and applies the provided value to the shorter of the width or height. The other dimension is then calculated automatically if 'maintain aspect ratio' is enabled.
ast.target: 插件会自动读取原始图像尺寸，并将提供的值应用于宽度或高度中较短的一边。如果启用“maintain aspect ratio”，另一维度将自动计算。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set both width and height using the format |widthxheight (e.g., 300x200) or percentage format (e.g., 50x75). This does not preserve aspect ratio.
ast.target: 使用 |widthxheight 格式（例如 300x200）或百分比格式（例如 50x75）同时设置宽度和高度。这不会保留纵横比。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the maximum width of the image to fit within the editor's width. You can specify a percentage or a fixed pixel value.
ast.target: 设置图像的最大宽度以适配编辑器宽度。你可以指定百分比或固定像素值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Preserve the image's original proportions when resizing.
ast.target: 调整大小时保留图像的原始比例。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Controls how images are adjusted relative to target size:
- Auto: adjusts image to fit specified dimensions
- Reduce only: only shrinks images larger than target
- Enlarge only: only enlarges images smaller than target
ast.target:
控制图像相对于目标尺寸的调整方式：
- 自动：调整图像以适配指定尺寸
- 仅缩小：只缩小大于目标的图像
- 仅放大：只放大小于目标的图像

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When calculating dimensions, prevent the image from exceeding the editor's width.
ast.target: 计算尺寸时，防止图像超过编辑器宽度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Constant rate factor for AVIF (0-63, lower is better quality). Range varies by encoder - click 'Detect encoder' to see the specific range.
ast.target: AVIF 的恒定速率因子（0-63，越低质量越好）。范围因编码器而异——点击“Detect encoder”查看具体范围。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Process images in all subfolders as well
ast.target: 同时处理所有子文件夹中的图像

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Images linked in notes or Canvas
ast.target: 笔记或 Canvas 中链接的图像

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose output format. 'Same as original' applies compression/resizing to current format.
ast.target: 选择输出格式。“Same as original”会对当前格式进行压缩/调整大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list (no dots or spaces, e.g., png,gif).
ast.target: 用逗号分隔的列表（不含点或空格，例如 png,gif）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip compression/resizing if image is already in target format.
ast.target: 如果图像已是目标格式，则跳过压缩/调整大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how images should be resized. Note: Results are permanent
ast.target: 选择图像应如何调整大小。注意：结果是永久性的

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reduce and enlarge: Adjusts all images. Reduce only: Shrinks larger images. Enlarge only: Enlarges smaller images.
ast.target: 缩小和放大：调整所有图像。仅缩小：缩小较大的图像。仅放大：放大较小的图像。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose output format for your images

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how images should be resized — results are permanent.
ast.target: 选择图像应如何调整大小—结果是永久性的。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls how images are adjusted relative to target size:
ast.target: 控制图像相对于目标尺寸的调整方式：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose output format. Same as original applies compression/resizing to current format
ast.target: 选择输出格式。“与原始相同”会对当前格式进行压缩/调整大小

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how images should be resized. Note: results are permanent
ast.target: 选择图像应如何调整大小。注意：结果是永久性的

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list (no dots or spaces). Example: png,gif
ast.target: 用逗号分隔的列表（不含点或空格）。示例：png,gif

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reduce and enlarge: adjusts all images. Reduce only: shrinks larger images. Enlarge only: enlarges smaller images
ast.target: 缩小和放大：调整所有图像。仅缩小：缩小较大的图像。仅放大：放大较小的图像

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 拖放/粘贴后的光标位置 🛈

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show notification for image size changes 🛈
ast.target: 显示图像尺寸变更通知 🛈

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 新图像的默认对齐方式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 图像对齐缓存清理间隔

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Lock the aspect ratio when dragging

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用鼠标滚轮调整大小

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 鼠标滚轮调整大小灵敏度

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 调整大小时的光标位置 🛈

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 允许在阅读模式下调整大小

ast.name: setName
ast.source: If an output file already exists

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 如果更大则恢复原始尺寸

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 复制为 Base64 编码图像

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 处理文件夹中的所有图像

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Enable to show a right-click context menu.
ast.target: 启用以显示右键上下文菜单。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Where to place the cursor after dropping or pasting the image
ast.target: 拖放或粘贴图像后将光标放置的位置

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Display a notification showing how much space was saved after processing an image.
ast.target: 显示通知，展示处理图像后节省了多少空间。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Save current selection as a new global preset
ast.target: 将当前选择保存为新的全局预设

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: If you use Obsidian Sync, it is strongly recommended to use the SAME location on all your devices to ensure consistent behavior. Default: Obsidian's config folder (syncable).
ast.target: 如果你使用 Obsidian Sync，强烈建议在所有设备上使用相同的位置，以确保一致的行为。默认：Obsidian 的配置文件夹（可同步）。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Where to place the cursor when resizing an image. Note: 'don't move cursor' - will try to keep your exisiting cursor in place but if you DRAG-RESIZE and cursor is still over the image when you finish resizing, it will get the text selected.
ast.target: 调整图像大小时光标的位置。注意：“don't move cursor”会尝试保持现有光标位置，但如果你拖拽调整大小且完成时光标仍在图像上方，则会选中文本。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Instructs pngquant to use the least amount of colors required to meet or exceed the max quality. min and max are numbers in range 0 (worst) to 100 (perfect).
ast.target: 指示 pngquant 使用满足或超过最高质量所需的最少颜色数。min 和 max 是 0（最差）到 100（完美）范围内的数值。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Same as original: preserves current format while applying compression/resizing
ast.target: 与原图相同：在进行压缩/调整大小时保留当前格式

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source:
100: No compression (original quality)
75: Recommended (good balance)
0-50: High compression (lower quality)
ast.target:
100：不压缩（原始质量）
75：推荐（良好平衡）
0-50：高压缩（较低质量）

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: If image is already in target format, this allows you to skip its compression, conversion and resizing. Processing of all other formats will be still performed.
ast.target: 如果图像已是目标格式，此选项允许跳过其压缩、转换和调整大小。其他格式仍会继续处理。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source:
Fit: Maintains aspect ratio within dimensions
Fill: Exactly matches dimensions
Longest Edge: Limits the longest side
Shortest Edge: Limits the shortest side
Width/Height: Constrains single dimension
ast.target:
适应：在尺寸内保持纵横比
填充：精确匹配尺寸
最长边：限制最长边
最短边：限制最短边
宽度/高度：限制单一维度

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source:
• Reduce and enlarge: Adjusts all images to fit specified dimensions
• Reduce only: Only shrinks images larger than target
• Enlarge only: Only enlarges images smaller than target
ast.target:
• 缩小并放大：调整所有图像以适配指定尺寸
• 仅缩小：只缩小大于目标的图像
• 仅放大：只放大小于目标的图像

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source:
100: no compression (original quality)
75: recommended (good balance)
0-50: high compression (lower quality)
ast.target:
100：不压缩（原始质量）
75：推荐（良好平衡）
0-50：高压缩（较低质量）

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source:
Fit: maintains aspect ratio within dimensions
Fill: exactly matches dimensions
Longest edge: limits the longest side
Shortest edge: limits the shortest side
Width/height: constrains single dimension
ast.target:

填充：精确匹配尺寸
最长边：限制最长边
最短边：限制最短边
宽度/高度：限制单一维度

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source:
• Reduce and enlarge: adjusts all images to fit specified dimensions
• Reduce only: only shrinks images larger than target
• Enlarge only: only enlarges images smaller than target
ast.target:
• 缩小并放大：调整所有图像以适配指定尺寸
• 仅缩小：只缩小大于目标的图像
• 仅放大：只放大小于目标的图像

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source:
Fit: Maintains aspect ratio within dimensions
Fill: Exactly matches dimensions
Longest edge: Limits the longest side
Shortest edge: Limits the shortest side
Width/Height: Constrains single dimension
ast.target:

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No working AV1 encoder found. Please install FFmpeg with AV1 support.
ast.target: 未找到可用的 AV1 编码器。请安装支持 AV1 的 FFmpeg。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Active leaf or view not found, using default 800
ast.target: 未找到活动叶子或视图，使用默认值 800

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Active view is not a MarkdownView or has no editor, using default 800
ast.target: 活动视图不是 MarkdownView 或没有编辑器，使用默认值 800

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Could not determine content width, using default 800
ast.target: 无法确定内容宽度，使用默认值 800

ast.name: warn
ast.source: HistoryManager.serializeObject: FabricObject.toObject() returned an unexpected shape. This may indicate a custom object with incompatible serialization. A minimal safe representation will be stored in history.
ast.target: HistoryManager.serializeObject: FabricObject.toObject() 返回了意外的结构。这可能表示自定义对象的序列化不兼容。将以最小安全表示存储到历史记录中。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: HistoryManager.parseState: Expected array but received different type. This may indicate incompatible state format from a different plugin version.
ast.target: HistoryManager.parseState: 期望数组但收到不同类型。这可能表示来自不同插件版本的不兼容状态格式。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: HistoryManager.parseState: Filtered out invalid objects from parsed state. Possible causes: corrupted state, incompatible serialization format, or plugin version mismatch. Consider clearing annotation history if issues persist.
ast.target: HistoryManager.parseState: 从解析后的状态中过滤掉了无效对象。可能原因：状态损坏、序列化格式不兼容或插件版本不匹配。如问题持续，建议清除标注历史记录。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Could not get active file for image:

ast.name: description
ast.source: The size of the image in megabytes (2 decimal places).
ast.target: 图片大小（兆字节，保留两位小数）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name of the current note.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name of the current note with spaces replaced by underscores.
ast.target: 当前笔记名称（空格替换为下划线）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The current date in a custom format using Moment.js syntax.
ast.target: 使用 Moment.js 语法的自定义格式当前日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The current day of the month (01-31).

ast.name: description
ast.source: The current day of the week.

ast.name: description
ast.source: A calendar view of the current date/time.
ast.target: 当前日期/时间的日历视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The start of the current week (YYYY-MM-DD).

ast.name: description
ast.source: The end of the current week (YYYY-MM-DD).

ast.name: description
ast.source: The start of the current month (YYYY-MM-DD).

ast.name: description
ast.source: The end of the current month (YYYY-MM-DD).

ast.name: description
ast.source: The number of days in the current month.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The week number of the current year.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The quarter of the current year.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name of the current month.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name of the current day of the week.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The current date with ordinal suffix (e.g., 28th).
ast.target: 带序数后缀的当前日期（例如：28th）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 相对于当前时间的时长。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The root path of the vault.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name of the immediate parent folder of the note.
ast.target: 笔记的直接父文件夹名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Parent of the parent folder of the note, but not the vault root
ast.target: 笔记父文件夹的上一级父文件夹，但不是存储库根目录

ast.name: description
ast.source: The full path of the current note.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The width of the image in pixels.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The height of the image in pixels.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The aspect ratio of the image (width/height, 2 decimal places).
ast.target: 图像的宽高比（宽/高，保留2位小数）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The orientation of the image (landscape, portrait, or square).
ast.target: 图像的方向（横向、纵向或正方形）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The resolution of the image (width x height).
ast.target: 图像的分辨率（宽 x 高）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The aspect ratio of the image, same as {aspectratio}.
ast.target: 图像的宽高比，与 {aspectratio} 相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The quality setting for image conversion/compression.
ast.target: 图像转换/压缩的质量设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The size of the image in megapixels (2 decimal places).
ast.target: 图像大小（百万像素，保留2位小数）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether the image is a perfect square (true/false).

ast.name: description
ast.source: The total number of pixels in the image.

ast.name: description
ast.source: A common aspect ratio category (e.g., 4:3, 16:9, custom).
ast.target: 常见的宽高比类别（例如 4:3、16:9、自定义）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A category based on pixel count (tiny, small, medium, large, very-large).

ast.name: description
ast.source: A category based on file size (e.g., 0-50KB, 51-200KB, etc.).
ast.target: 基于文件大小的类别（例如 0-50KB、51-200KB 等）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether the width or height is larger, or if they are equal.
ast.target: 宽度或高度是否更大，或两者是否相等。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The absolute difference between width and height.
ast.target: 宽度与高度的绝对差值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The average number of bytes per pixel (2 decimal places).
ast.target: 每像素的平均字节数（保留 2 位小数）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An estimate of the image compression ratio (2 decimal places).
ast.target: 图像压缩比的估计值（保留 2 位小数）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The larger dimension (width or height) of the image.
ast.target: 图像较大的尺寸（宽度或高度）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The smaller dimension (width or height) of the image.
ast.target: 图像较小的尺寸（宽度或高度）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The diagonal pixel length of the image.
ast.target: 图像的对角线像素长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The aspect ratio in its simplest whole number form.
ast.target: 最简整数形式的宽高比。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A category based on whether the image fits within common screen sizes (e.g., fits-1080p, fits-1440p, fits-4k, above-4k).
ast.target: 基于图像是否适配常见屏幕尺寸的类别（例如 fits-1080p、fits-1440p、fits-4k、above-4k）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 随机字母数字字符串（6 个字符）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A random hexadecimal string of X characters.
ast.target: 由 X 个字符组成的随机十六进制字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first 8 characters of the MD5 hash of the specified type. Supports: filename, fullpath, parentfolder, rootfolder, extension, notename, notefolder, notepath.
ast.target: 指定类型的 MD5 哈希的前 8 个字符。支持：filename、fullpath、parentfolder、rootfolder、extension、notename、notefolder、notepath。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first X characters of the MD5 hash of the specified type. Supports the same types as {MD5:type}.
ast.target: 指定类型的 MD5 哈希的前 X 个字符。支持与 {MD5:type} 相同的类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The full MD5 hash of a custom text.
ast.target: 自定义文本的完整 MD5 哈希。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Image size in a specific unit (B, KB, MB) with custom decimal places.
ast.target: 以指定单位（B、KB、MB）显示的图像大小，可自定义小数位数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The SHA-256 hash of the image content.
ast.target: 图像内容的 SHA-256 哈希。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The SHA-256 hash of the specified type. Supports: filename, fullpath, parentfolder, rootfolder, extension, notename, notefolder, notepath.
ast.target: 指定类型的 SHA-256 哈希。支持：filename、fullpath、parentfolder、rootfolder、extension、notename、notefolder、notepath。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first X characters of the SHA-256 hash of the specified type. Supports the same types as {sha256:type}.
ast.target: 指定类型的 SHA-256 哈希的前 X 个字符。支持与 {sha256:type} 相同的类型。

ast.target: 与当前笔记相同文件夹

ast.source: Preview not available for this format.

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ This will modify all images in the current note — please ensure you have backups.
ast.target: ⚠️ 这将修改当前笔记中的所有图片——请确保您有备份。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Convert, compress and resize all images
ast.target: 转换、压缩并调整所有图片大小

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ This will modify all images in the vault. Please ensure you have backups.
ast.target: ⚠️ 这将修改库中的所有图片。请确保您有备份。
